response.global_analysis:
1. Song Identification: Identified three songs ('Ochame Kinou', 'Lead Control', and 'Cyberpunk Dead Boy') with various VTuber performers.
2. Lyric/Transcription Matching: Followed the Japanese vocals of the actual performance closely, including the chaotic talking section in 'Ochame Kinou' which was transcribed and summarized for readability.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to start and end with vocal onset/offset, avoiding cascading delays during fast segments. Pure instrumental sections are left completely silent.

subtitles.original: はーい！はーい！はーい！はーい！
subtitles.english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes!

subtitles.original: はなまるよくできました☆
subtitles.english: You get a gold star! Well done! ☆

subtitles.original: あーむかつくぜ まーむかつくぜ
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm so annoyed! Seriously, I'm so annoyed!

subtitles.original: 僕に向かって減らず口なんざ
subtitles.english: Spouting such cheekiness to me!

subtitles.original: とっておきを君に見舞え
subtitles.english: I'll unleash my best trick on you!

subtitles.original: 報復制裁 挑発しちゃって保存
subtitles.english: Retaliation and punishment, teasing you!

subtitles.original: 意地悪して一枚上手
subtitles.english: Playing mean, I'm one step ahead!

subtitles.original: チャンスはもらってくぜ
subtitles.english: I'm taking this opportunity!

subtitles.original: 痛恨ミス あっ ちゃっ ちゃー
subtitles.english: A critical mistake! Oh, my goodness!

subtitles.original: おあいにく様だね 君の負け保存
subtitles.english: Too bad for you, you lose!

subtitles.original: Yes!
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: だけど君 君だけが
subtitles.english: But you, only you...

subtitles.original: 僕に似合いのライバル
subtitles.english: ...are a rival worthy of me.

subtitles.original: 落ちるのも へこんでんのも保存
subtitles.english: Falling down or feeling depressed,

subtitles.original: 調子狂わされるから
subtitles.english: you throw me completely off my rhythm,

subtitles.original: 今宵もテメエと やい！やい！やい！やい！
subtitles.english: so tonight again, with you, let's fight! Fight! Fight! Fight!

subtitles.original: やい！
subtitles.english: Fight!

subtitles.original: 大体お前がいつも暴走するから僕が尻拭いせざるを得なくなるんだろ！何言ってんの！
subtitles.english: Since you always run wild, I have to clean up after you! What are you talking about?!

subtitles.original: 年上のくせに頼りにならない！慎重なフリしたってヘタレてたぞほんともう！
subtitles.english: Even though you're older, you're so unreliable! You act cautious but you were just chickening out!

subtitles.original: ハイ決定！
subtitles.english: It's decided!

subtitles.original: あーむかつくぜ まーむかつくぜ
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm so annoyed! Seriously, I'm so annoyed!

subtitles.original: 憎まれ口もお口をチャック
subtitles.english: Zip your mouth with those abusive remarks!

subtitles.original: 鬨の声 ゴングを鳴らせ
subtitles.english: A battle cry! Sound the gong!

subtitles.original: 次世代エンペラーはこの俺だ
subtitles.english: The next generation emperor is me!

subtitles.original: 悪戯して 悪乗りして
subtitles.english: Playing pranks, getting carried away!

subtitles.original: ほらほら煽ってくスタイルで
subtitles.english: Look, look, this is our style of teasing!

subtitles.original: 1から100 いただきます
subtitles.english: From 1 to 100, thank you for the feast!

subtitles.original: 毎度ありがとうで君の負け
subtitles.english: Thanks as always, and you lose!

subtitles.original: まさかの
subtitles.english: Could it be...

subtitles.original: 引き分け！？
subtitles.english: ...a draw?!

subtitles.original: えーーーっ！
subtitles.english: Whaaat?!

subtitles.original: この頃君がまとう しつけ直しの季節の匂い
subtitles.english: Lately you wear the scent of a season of re-discipline.

subtitles.original: したたかな佇まいのわりに脆い そこに触れるの
subtitles.english: Despite your tough posture, you are fragile when I touch you there.

subtitles.original: 怒らないでダーリン だってホントのことだもん
subtitles.english: Don't be mad, darling, because it's the truth after all.

subtitles.original: 体ばかり大きくなって中身はガキだよね
subtitles.english: Your body has grown big, but you're still a kid inside.

subtitles.original: あばれないでドッグ 私が主の手だから
subtitles.english: Don't wild out, dog, because I am the hand of your master.

subtitles.original: リードなんて気まぐれ パッと外しちゃうかも
subtitles.english: The leash is whimsical; I might just take it off in a flash.

subtitles.original: だらしない 意気地ない ホント君は救えない
subtitles.english: Sloppy, spineless, you're truly beyond saving.

subtitles.original: 堕落にふけっちゃってご愁傷様
subtitles.english: Drowning in depravity, my condolences.

subtitles.original: 夢がない 覇気もない くせに愛は欲しいの？
subtitles.english: No dreams, no ambition, yet you still want love?

subtitles.original: なら3回回ってお手からワン
subtitles.english: Then spin three times, give me your paw, and bark.

subtitles.original: ルルルルッ テュルルル
subtitles.english: Lu lu lu... tyu ru ru...

subtitles.original: ルルルルッ テュルルル
subtitles.english: Lu lu lu... tyu ru ru...

subtitles.original: ルルルルッ テュルルル
subtitles.english: Lu lu lu... tyu ru ru...

subtitles.original: 欲深だったの？ 歪み 妬み 人の宝物
subtitles.english: Were you greedy? Distorted, jealous of other people's treasures.

subtitles.original: この世は罠だらけね ずっとここにいて
subtitles.english: This world is full of traps, stay here forever.

subtitles.original: 手なずけてた奥義 生まれ持った才知のすべて
subtitles.english: The secrets I tamed, all of your inborn wit.

subtitles.original: 全部狂わせて今日も正常？ 私と舞いな
subtitles.english: Drive everything crazy, today is normal too? Dance with me.

subtitles.original: あがいたって餌捌き次第ね 私は知らない
subtitles.english: Even if you struggle, it's up to my feeding skill. I don't care.

subtitles.original: 私、主を知らなかった頃の日々に戻りたい
subtitles.english: I want to return to the days before I knew my master.

subtitles.original: Our love is trapped
subtitles.english: Our love is trapped

subtitles.original: We'll lose our way if we lose our track
subtitles.english: We'll lose our way if we lose our track

subtitles.original: もう、主を知らなかった頃の君は戻らない
subtitles.english: The you from before you knew your master will never return.
